texto: Honour bought of coin is but grass in the wind. When the wind blows south it leans south
autor: when the wind blows north so does it lean. Hardly solid rock upon which to forge sturdy trust nor imperishable friendship
explicacao: Citação de when the wind blows north so does it lean. Hardly solid rock upon which to forge sturdy trust nor imperishable friendship sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Honour bought of coin is but grass in the wind. When the wind blows south it leans south” articula reflexao, jj-matebesi, south em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
